title: A street lamp gutters out
body: Down Iron Cross Street a gas lamp dies on its own. Passers-by pretend not to notice.

title: Dock rumor reaches you
body: Sailors whisper of a barge that unloaded crates after curfew and left no manifest.

effects.text: Find the unlisted barge at the harbor.

title: Panic in the night market
body: A woman screams that her reflection 'turned to look at her'. The crowd scatters.

title: The Beyond presses closer
body: For a heartbeat every shadow in the district points the same wrong way.

effects.text: The ritual is near. Pressure is climbing fast.

title: A quiet watch
body: Nothing stirs. The fatigue of the long night settles into your shoulders.
